sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: REX AI Equity Premium Income ETF (AIPI) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This Yahoo Finance page provides a detailed overview of the REX AI Equity Premium Income ETF (AIPI), including its current stock price, recent performance data, and key financial metrics. It highlights the ETF's investment strategy, which involves investing primarily in securities from the BITA AI Leaders Select Index, and notes its significant allocation to the technology sector. The page also offers comparative data with other related ETFs and shows a list of trending tickers in the market.

feed.title: Humana, CVS Climb After Medicare Finalizes 2.48% Rate Hike (1)
feed.summary: The US Medicare program will increase payments to private insurers by 2.48% in 2027, a significant improvement over earlier proposals. This final policy from the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services is expected to add over $13 billion to Medicare Advantage plans next year. Following the announcement, shares of major insurance companies like UnitedHealth Group, Humana, and CVS Health Corp. saw considerable gains in premarket trading.

feed.title: IAC adjusts MGM Resorts (NYSE: MGM) stake and signs new voting pact
feed.summary: IAC Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13D, reporting its beneficial ownership of approximately 65,822,350 shares of MGM Resorts International, which represents about 25.7% of outstanding shares. A new Voting Agreement has been signed with MGM and Barry Diller, stipulating that any voting securities held by IAC, Mr. Diller, and their affiliates exceeding 25.73% of MGM’s voting power must be voted proportionally with other MGM stockholders. The agreement outlines specific conditions for its termination, including a drop in collective stake, failure to nominate IAC-designated directors, or a change of control at MGM.

feed.title: AEHR TEST SYSTEMS ($AEHR) Releases Q3 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: AEHR TEST SYSTEMS ($AEHR) reported Q3 2026 earnings, beating EPS estimates by $0.02 with -$0.05 per share, but missing revenue estimates with $10.31 million. The stock price declined by 4.8% since market close. Insider trading data shows 11 sales and no purchases in the last six months, while institutional investors have shown mixed activity with some adding and others reducing positions.

feed.title: CMS Energy to pair first-quarter results with 2026 outlook in webcast
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) announced it would release its 2026 first-quarter results and provide a business and financial outlook on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EDT. A live webcast will be available on the company's website, with an audio replay archived for 30 days. The announcement also details the company's past earnings call patterns and recent operational news.

feed.title: CMS Energy to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results on April 28
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) announced it will provide its 2026 first-quarter results and a business and financial outlook on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EDT. A webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's website, cmsenergy.com, with an audio replay archived for 30 days in the "Investors" section. CMS Energy is a Michigan-based energy company with Consumers Energy as its primary business.

feed.title: Aehr Test Systems reports Q3 EPS (5c), consensus (7c)
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems reported Q3 EPS of (5c), outperforming the consensus estimate of (7c). The company's Q3 revenue was $10.31M, against a consensus of $10.85M, with strong bookings of $37.2M and a book-to-bill ratio over 3.5x. Aehr highlighted accelerating demand across its WLBI and PLBI segments due to increased semiconductor complexity and applications in AI, networking, automotive, and industrial sectors.

feed.title: Ball to Announce First Quarter Earnings on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. The company will host a quarterly conference call at 6:30 a.m. Mountain Time (8:30 a.m. Eastern Time) to discuss its results and performance. A webcast and replay will be available for those unable to attend the live call.

feed.title: Does Generac (GNRC) And CPower’s PJM Deal Quietly Reposition Its Commercial Energy Strategy?
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. and CPower Energy have partnered to deploy distributed generation solutions for commercial and industrial customers in PJM, including battery storage, generators, and microgrids. This collaboration aims to leverage Generac's equipment and CPower's demand response expertise to address rising electricity demand and high power prices. The deal reinforces Generac's strategy to expand its commercial and industrial energy solutions, moving beyond weather-driven residential demand while executing on data center generator opportunities and navigating risks from its clean energy segment.

feed.title: Global Payments Inc. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. (GPN) stock experienced a 3.60% decline on Tuesday, closing at $62.70, underperforming key market indices like the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average. The company's stock is now 31.07% below its 52-week high of $90.96.

feed.title: PNC completes $119.3B community benefits plan, breezes past original goal
feed.summary: PNC has concluded its $119.3 billion community investment plan, surpassing original expectations. The plan, initiated after a significant acquisition, focused on distributing funds across housing, small business, and charitable initiatives nationwide. The bank's efforts demonstrate a strong commitment to community development.

feed.title: Adtran Holdings, Inc. / US00486H1059
feed.summary: This article reports on a major holdings notification by Adtran Holdings, Inc. to comply with the German Securities Trading Act. The notification details that The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. has acquired/disposed of shares with voting rights, resulting in a total voting rights percentage of 10.85% as of April 1, 2026. The report includes a breakdown of direct and indirect voting rights, as well as those held through various financial instruments.

feed.title: Deep Track files Schedule 13G reporting 7.36M shares in ALMS (ALMS)
feed.summary: Deep Track Capital, Deep Track Biotechnology Master Fund, and David Kroin have jointly filed a Schedule 13G, reporting beneficial ownership of 7,362,035 shares of ALUMIS Inc. (ALMS). This represents 5.98% of the company's common stock as of April 7, 2026. The filing indicates shared voting and dispositive power over these shares, based on 123,139,425 shares outstanding as of March 12, 2026.

feed.title: MAA (NYSE: MAA) EVP French Barton reports 8,508-share ownership in Form 3
feed.summary: MID AMERICA APARTMENT COMMUNITIES INC. EVP Investments, James Barton French, has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) disclosing direct ownership of 8,508 shares of the company's Common Stock. This filing establishes his beneficially owned shares as of April 1, 2026, and does not indicate any recent buy or sell transactions. The report serves as a baseline for his holdings within the company.

feed.title: Aehr Test Systems reports $37.2M bookings in fiscal Q3
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ:AEHR) announced $37.2 million in bookings for its fiscal Q3 ended February 27, 2026, achieving a book-to-bill ratio over 3.5x. Despite a decline in net revenue and an increased GAAP net loss compared to the prior year, the company holds a backlog of $38.7 million and expects strong bookings for the second half of fiscal 2026. The company also recently secured significant orders from a new silicon photonics customer and a follow-on order from an existing one, reinforcing its position in the AI and data center markets.

feed.title: Executive pay and board elections at Alkami (NASDAQ: ALKT)
feed.summary: Alkami Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALKT) will hold its virtual annual shareholder meeting on May 19, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of three Class II directors, the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, and an advisory proposal on executive compensation. The company reported 2025 GAAP revenue of $443.6 million, a 32.9% year-over-year increase, and Adjusted EBITDA of $59.1 million, while also noting a GAAP net loss of $47.7 million. Executive compensation for 2025 emphasizes a pay-for-performance approach tied to annual financial results and long-term equity incentives, with annual bonus payouts averaging 125.3% of target.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Tractor Supply (TSCO) Earnings Miss Amid Expanded FFA Community Initiatives
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company recently reported a softer fourth quarter with revenue missing analyst expectations and weaker full-year earnings guidance. Despite this, the company continues to invest in community engagement, such as an FFA-exclusive contest, to strengthen its rural brand identity. Investors will likely weigh these near-term financial pressures against the company's long-term strategy of fostering customer loyalty and its "Life Out Here" community focus.

feed.title: Alnylam (NASDAQ: ALNY) HR chief auto-sells shares to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals' Chief Human Resources Officer, Melissa McLaughlin, reported the automatic sale of 3,910 shares of common stock on April 2 and April 6, 2026. These transactions were executed to cover minimum statutory tax withholding obligations on vested restricted stock units, as per a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan adopted on December 16, 2025. Following these sales, McLaughlin directly holds 9,443 shares of Alnylam common stock.

feed.title: Equifax will post March-quarter results before market open April 21
feed.summary: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) is scheduled to report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 21, 2026. The company will issue a press release and post presentation materials at 6:30 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. An audio replay of the call will be available on their investor website starting April 22.

feed.title: Alexander’s (NYSE: ALX) outlines 2026 vote on new omnibus stock plan
feed.summary: Alexander's (NYSE: ALX) is preparing for its virtual annual meeting on May 21, 2026, where stockholders will vote on several key proposals, including the election of three Class II directors and the adoption of a new 2026 Omnibus Stock Plan. This new plan seeks to authorize up to 500,000 shares for future equity awards, replacing the remaining pool of the 2016 plan. Given that Interstate Properties and Vornado Realty Trust collectively own approximately 58% of outstanding shares and intend to vote in favor of all proposals, their approval is highly anticipated.

feed.title: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc Stock (CRWD) Closed Up by 5.88% on Apr 7: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (CRWD) saw a 5.88% increase in its stock price on April 7, driven by several factors including an additional $500 million share repurchase authorization, a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts, and the unveiling of its Charlotte AI AgentWorks Ecosystem at RSA 2026. These developments, coupled with strong financial performance and overall growth in the cybersecurity sector, contributed to the positive market reaction despite some intraday volatility.

feed.title: American Healthcare REIT to post Q1 results May 7, hold webcast May 8
feed.summary: American Healthcare REIT (NYSE: AHR) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 earnings on May 7, 2026, after market close, followed by a public conference call and webcast on May 8, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET. The company will review its Q1 2026 results, discuss recent events, and conduct a Q&A session. Investors can access the webcast or join via telephone, with a digital replay and full earnings report available on the company's Investor Relations website shortly after the call.

feed.title: Essex will post quarterly results April 28, with open webcast next day
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESS) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026, after market close. A conference call with senior management is scheduled for April 29, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time, accessible via internet or phone, with a replay available for 30 days online and 7 days digitally. Essex Property Trust is an S&P 500 REIT managing multifamily residential properties in West Coast markets.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Inc Stock (PANW) Closed Up by 4.56% on Apr 7: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc (PANW) stock closed up by 4.56% on April 7, driven by CEO Nikesh Arora's $10 million stock purchase, a "Buy" rating from Benchmark with a $200 price target, and increasing demand in the cybersecurity sector. The company's strong next-generation security revenue growth and strategic positioning in a high-growth market, fueled by AI adoption and escalating threats, contribute to its positive outlook, despite risks such as revised guidance and potential share dilution from acquisitions.

feed.title: General Mills WARN Act Investigation
feed.summary: Strauss Borrelli PLLC is investigating General Mills Operations LLC for a potential violation of the WARN Act following a mass layoff of 163 employees in Saint Charles, Missouri. The law firm believes General Mills may have failed to provide the required 60-day notice, entitling affected employees to severance pay and benefits. The WARN Act mandates that employers with 100+ employees provide 60 days' notice for significant layoffs or plant closings to help workers prepare for job loss.

feed.title: Director at Andersons, Inc. (ANDE) sells 15,000 Common Stock shares
feed.summary: Andersons, Inc. director Patrick E. Bowe reported an open-market sale of 15,000 shares of Common Stock at $74.33 per share on April 6, 2026. This transaction amounted to an approximate sale value of $1,114,950. Following the sale, Bowe directly holds 129,874.6324 shares of the company.

feed.title: ZTO Express (Cayman) Sees Unusually High Options Volume (NYSE:ZTO)
feed.summary: ZTO Express (Cayman) (NYSE:ZTO) experienced unusually high options trading volume on Tuesday, with traders purchasing 19,202 call options, a 2,423% increase from the average. This surge coincides with institutional investors like Pzena and Morgan Stanley increasing their stakes, bringing total institutional ownership to 41.65%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for ZTO, which recently declared a $0.39 dividend.

feed.title: U.S. Indexes Ended Tuesday Mixed As Paramount Skydance Led, Axon Enterprise Lagged
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes closed mixed on Tuesday, with some gaining slightly and one experiencing a modest drop. The NASDAQ, S&P 500, and Dow Jones Industrial Average all saw minor movements. Specific companies like Paramount Skydance led, while Axon Enterprise lagged.

feed.title: Peraso to Present at the Centri Capital Conference
feed.summary: Peraso Inc. announced that CEO Ron Glibbery and CFO Jim Sullivan will present at the Centri Capital Conference on April 14, 2026, at Nasdaq MarketSite. They are scheduled to speak at 9:30 A.M. Eastern Time and will also hold one-on-one meetings. A webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: SLB OneSubsea and Subsea7 Sign Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname
feed.summary: SLB OneSubsea and Subsea7 have signed a strategic collaboration agreement with PETRONAS Suriname E&P B.V. to accelerate subsea oil and gas developments in Suriname's emerging frontier basin. This partnership aims to co-develop cost-effective solutions and enhance project economics by integrating expertise across the project lifecycle, including engineering, procurement, construction, installation, and commissioning (EPCIC) for subsea production systems (SPS) and subsea umbilical, riser, and flowlines (SURF) components. The collaboration seeks to reduce risks, shorten timelines, and deliver significant value to PETRONAS Suriname through early engagement and integrated execution.

feed.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike Stocks Pop After Anthropic Announces Partnerships
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks and CrowdStrike Holdings saw their stock prices increase after Anthropic announced new partnerships. This development marks a shift from previous instances where Anthropic's announcements had a negative impact on software and cybersecurity stocks. The partnership is named Project Glasswing.

feed.title: News Explorer — Charles Schwab Says Crypto Inclusion in Portfolios Depends on Risk Tolerance, Not Returns
feed.summary: Charles Schwab's research indicates that incorporating cryptocurrencies into a financial portfolio should be based on an individual's risk tolerance rather than anticipated returns. Due to the high volatility of assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum, even a minor allocation to crypto can significantly impact a portfolio's overall risk profile. This perspective highlights the importance of personal risk assessment in crypto investment strategies.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) PT Lowered to $55 at Citi
feed.summary: Citi analyst Steven Zaccone has lowered the price target for Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) to $55. The article states that this is a premium content piece and requires a subscription to StreetInsider.com Premium to read the full details.

feed.title: Vertical Data Inc. to Host Corporate Overview Webinar for Investors
feed.summary: Vertical Data Inc. (OTCQB:VDTA) announced it will host a live corporate overview webinar on April 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Pacific Time. CEO Deven Soni will discuss the company's business model, operational progress, capital markets strategy, and growth roadmap in the AI infrastructure sector, including its GPU financing platform and edge data center buildout. A live Q&A session will follow the presentation, and a replay will be available online.

feed.title: NRG Energy (NRG) director E. Spencer Abraham resigns ahead of April 30 meeting
feed.summary: NRG Energy, Inc. announced that director E. Spencer Abraham resigned from its Board of Directors, effective April 3, 2026, due to personal reasons. The company clarified that his departure was not due to any disagreements with the company's operations, policies, or management. Abraham was also not standing for re-election at the upcoming annual stockholder meeting on April 30, 2026, as part of the board's succession planning, a fact previously disclosed in a proxy statement.

feed.title: ROLLINS, INC. SCHEDULES DATE FOR RELEASE OF FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the call via phone or live webcast on the company's investor relations website, with a replay available for 180 days.

feed.title: James B. Murray Jr. discloses 3.61M shares in Acumen Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ABOS)
feed.summary: James B. Murray Jr. has disclosed a 5.00% beneficial ownership in Acumen Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ABOS), totaling 3,611,360 shares as of April 6, 2026. This stake is split between shares held in his revocable trust and shares held by Praxis Technologies LLC, for which he holds voting and dispositive power. The Schedule 13G filing, dated April 7, 2026, indicated that the filing was submitted late due to an inadvertent oversight.

feed.title: AI and data center demand drives $37.2M in orders at Aehr Test
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems reported strong quarterly bookings of $37.2 million for Q3 fiscal 2026, driven by high demand for its wafer-level burn-in (WLBI) and package-level burn-in (PLBI) solutions for AI and data center applications. Despite this, the company saw a decline in Q3 revenue to $10.3 million and a widened GAAP net loss of $3.2 million compared to the previous year. Aehr reaffirmed its second-half fiscal 2026 revenue guidance and anticipates significant growth in fiscal 2027, propelled by an expanding installed base in AI, silicon photonics, and power semiconductors.

feed.title: Arista Networks to Announce Q1 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, after U.S. markets close, followed by a conference call. The company also announced its participation in several upcoming investor events in May and June 2026, including the Needham Technology, Media & Consumer Conference, J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference, William Blair 46th Annual Growth Stock Conference, and Bank of America Global Technology Conference.

feed.title: Rollins lines up April 23 investor call after Q1 results arrive
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL) announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 22, 2026. The company will host a conference call on April 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to review these results, with dial-in options and a live webcast available. A replay of the call will be accessible on the company's website for 180 days.

feed.title: XPO Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for Thursday, April 30, 2026
feed.summary: XPO (NYSE: XPO) has announced its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call and webcast will take place on Thursday, April 30, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company's financial results will be released earlier that morning and will be accessible on its website. A replay of the call will be available until May 30, 2026.

feed.title: Kroger Begins Earth Month Campaign To Benefit World Wildlife Fund
feed.summary: Kroger has launched an Earth Month campaign encouraging customers to round up their purchases at checkout to benefit the World Wildlife Fund's conservation efforts. The Kroger Co. Zero Hunger | Zero Waste Foundation will match customer donations up to $50,000. Additionally, Kroger divisions are undertaking various local initiatives, such as tree planting, community cleanups, food rescue pilot programs, and vendor collaborations focused on regenerative farming.

feed.title: American Coastal (ACIC) CEO converts stock units and withholds shares for taxes
feed.summary: American Coastal Insurance Corp (ACIC) CEO Brad Martz converted 25,903 performance stock units, restricted stock units, and dividend equivalent units into common stock on April 3, 2026. To cover tax obligations related to this vesting, 10,365 common shares were withheld at $10.97 per share. Following these transactions, Martz directly holds 381,481 shares of ACIC common stock, reflecting a routine equity award vesting process rather than open-market trading.

feed.title: American Coastal Insurance (ACIC) COO exercises stock awards, shares withheld for tax
feed.summary: American Coastal Insurance Corp's COO, Christopher Griffith, exercised various equity awards including performance stock units, restricted stock units, and dividend equivalent units, converting them into common shares. To cover tax obligations, 4,241 common shares were withheld, rather than sold. Following these transactions, Griffith directly owns 113,075 shares of ACIC common stock.

feed.title: American Coastal Insurance (ACIC) officer exercises awards, boosts holdings
feed.summary: James Andy Gray, Chief Compliance/Risk Officer of American Coastal Insurance Corp (ACIC), exercised various stock-based awards on April 3, converting performance stock units, restricted stock units, and dividend equivalent units into common shares. He acquired 9,829 common shares through derivative exercises and disposed of 3,703 shares for tax obligations, resulting in a direct holding of 201,720 common shares. Gray also continues to hold 16,833 performance stock units and 8,418 restricted stock units, which are subject to three-year vesting conditions.

feed.title: Director files Form 144 to sell 498 performance shares (NASDAQ: VRSN)
feed.summary: A director of Verisign Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN) has filed a Form 144 to propose the sale of 498 performance shares. The filing also details multiple past sales by Thomas C. Indelicarto, ranging from 166 to 498 shares, executed between January 9, 2026, and March 25, 2026. This SEC disclosure provides transparency regarding the insider equity transactions for the company.

feed.title: Ignite deal: Aditxt (NASDAQ: ADTX) records $36,551K goodwill
feed.summary: Aditxt (NASDAQ: ADTX) has filed an amended current report (8-K/A) detailing the financial aspects of its acquisition of Ignite Proteomics LLC, including the full financial statements of Ignite and unaudited pro forma consolidated financials. The deal involved Aditxt issuing 36,000 shares of Series A-2 Convertible Preferred Stock, valued at $36.0 million, and assuming $808,000 in Ignite operating liabilities. Ignite's 2025 audited results showed modest revenue of $43,539, a significant net loss of $5,701,059, and a going concern warning, with the acquisition resulting in a preliminary goodwill of $36,551,000 recorded on Aditxt’s pro forma balance sheet.

feed.title: Raymond James holds 1.39M shares of Nuveen SPXX (SPXX) in 13G filing
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial Services Advisors, Inc. has filed a Schedule 13G indicating beneficial ownership of 1,392,911.49 shares of Nuveen S&P 500 Dynamic Overwrite Fund (SPXX), representing an 8.2% stake. This filing, as of March 31, 2026, reports sole dispositive power over the shares but no voting power, which is typical for brokerage or advisory custody arrangements. The disclosure provides transparency into significant ownership stakes in publicly traded companies.

feed.title: Realty Income (NYSE: O) issues $800M 4.750% notes due 2033
feed.summary: Realty Income Corporation has successfully closed an offering of $800 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.750% Notes due 2033. This issuance, completed on April 7, 2026, expands the company's long-term fixed-rate debt profile under an existing indenture, with major investment banks acting as underwriters. The specific use of proceeds was not detailed in the filing.

feed.title: EPAM Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) will host a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. A news release with these results will be issued before the call. The live webcast will be available on EPAM's website, with a replay also accessible for those unable to attend live.
